author: Biz
text: Continued on the session-state race. Added in-process per-session SessionDoc serialization for the DM hot paths to prevent lost updates between active_turn, LastInboundAt, and LastReplyAt. Switched persistInbound, persistAssistant, and setSessionActiveTurn to a shared updateSessionDoc helper backed by a per-session mutex map. Hardened cmd/metiqd testStore for concurrent access and added TestUpdateSessionDocSerializesConcurrentMutations. Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/memory/...

author: Biz
text: Follow-up hardening after review: changed active_turn=false cleanup to use a detached 5s background timeout so the clear write still runs when the parent turn context is already canceled. Validation rerun: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/memory/...

author: Biz
text: Expanded SessionDoc serialization beyond the DM hot paths. Added mutateSessionDoc/updateExistingSessionDoc/replaceSessionDoc helpers, routed the admin PutSession callback through serialized replace semantics, and converted control RPC/prune/session assignment mutation paths in cmd/metiqd/main.go to use the per-session lock. Also stopped agents.assign from seeding PeerPubKey with the session ID when persisting assignment metadata. Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/memory/...

author: Biz
text: Added destructive-op coordination against live turns. Extended internal/autoreply.SessionTurns with blocking Acquire(ctx, sessionID) plus test coverage, promoted the shared session-turn registry into cmd/metiqd, and wrapped sessions.reset/delete/compact and prune paths in exclusive turn access. Prune now re-checks eligibility after exclusivity is acquired so newly-active sessions are skipped instead of being pruned from a stale snapshot. Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/autoreply ./internal/memory/...

author: Biz
text: Unified admin/control-RPC prune through runSessionsPrune, updated explicit destructive session ops to best-effort abort active turns before waiting on exclusive session access, and applied the same exclusion to rotateSession and slash /session delete. Follow-up hardening: moved sessionRouter/seenChannelSessions mutations inside the exclusive section, restored a bounded 15s fallback wait when caller contexts have no deadline, and made slash delete idempotent without creating phantom tombstone SessionDocs. Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/autoreply ./internal/memory/...

author: Biz
text: Added targeted regression coverage around the new destructive-op coordination in cmd/metiqd/main_test.go: (1) sessions.reset waits for held session turn release before mutating session state, (2) runSessionsPrune skips a busy session without deleting transcript/session state, and (3) runSessionsPrune re-checks eligibility after release so a session that became active is not pruned. Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/autoreply ./internal/memory/...

author: Biz
text: Added direct regression coverage for the slash/lifecycle coordination path after extracting package-level helpers. New tests cover rotateSessionCoordinated waiting for held turn release before mutating sessionRouter/seenChannelSessions, and deleteSessionCoordinated waiting similarly while remaining idempotent on missing SessionDocs (no phantom deleted doc created). Validation: go test ./cmd/metiqd ./internal/autoreply ./internal/memory/...
